HomePage.title: Sonia
HomePage.about: This is an amazing platform that helps you achieve your goals.

overview.goal: Connect a Google Calendar and one-click import the next 14 days of Taipei events plus 214 birthday deals across Taiwan (free eats, BOGO), auto-deduplicated, with reminders on the birthday day / week / month.
overview.user: Deal-hunters and students who want birthday perks without checking each brand.

items: Integrated Google OAuth and Calendar API to read, merge, dedupe, and write back to the user's calendar.
Pulled events from Taipei open data and merged with a 214-entry birthday-deals database.
Built a one-click-deployable MVP with Next.js.
Defined the core flow (connect to fetch to dedupe to write-back to remind) to validate demand fast.
Built a 214-brand birthday-deals database; verified/updated 126 fields for accuracy.
Designed day/week/month reminder tiers to maximize usage.
Surfaced deals via calendar and map views to lower the lookup barrier.
Streamlined the authorize-and-import flow to a few steps.
Clear reminder-time tiering for at-a-glance understanding.

overview.goal: Independently shipped a warrant product landing page from 0 to 1 in a single day, owning the content and conversion strategy to unblock marketing's long-standing lack of ad creative.
overview.user: Retail investors drawn in by a limited-time campaign who want to sign up fast.

items: Shipped the landing page from 0 to 1 in a single day, unblocking marketing's long-standing lack of ad creative.
Owned the content and conversion strategy solo, achieving a 55% conversion rate and driving 2,000 sign-ups.
Drove targeted keywords to #1 in search via SEO strategy—ranking even above the company's official product page.
Built and launched a responsive landing page within one day with a consistent desktop/mobile experience.
Optimized SEO structure and metadata to rank targeted keywords #1, above the company's official site.
Integrated directly with the company cart to shorten the purchase path, reaching a 55% conversion rate.
With no design mockups, personally decided the page's information architecture and conversion flow.
Used strongly-guided CTA layouts to maximize add-to-cart conversion.

overview.goal: As the sole PM leading a 3-person team, built a long-term investing app from 0 to 1 and launched on iOS and Android; using a spec-driven (SDD) workflow with AI prototyping to go from requirements to engineering hand-off in 2 weeks.
overview.user: Long-term investors, often older, who need clear stock-picking signals.

items: As sole PM leading 2 engineers, built and launched on iOS/Android from 0 to 1, generating NT$3M in revenue and 1,000 weekly active users.
Introduced spec-driven development (SDD)—writing specs that AI turns into prototypes—compressing requirements-to-engineering hand-off to 2 weeks with no UI mockups.
Codified this AI-driven workflow into a company-wide AI development SOP, improving cross-team delivery speed.

overview.goal: Led the migration of the Longterm Treasure PC product to web, re-architecting to reduce error rates and improve load speed, and defining the post-launch success metrics.
overview.user: Investors who prefer desktop and want long-term stock screening on the web.

items: Led requirement decomposition and scope definition for the PC-to-web migration, re-architecting flows to cut error rates and improve load speed.
Defined the post-launch north-star metrics and tracking plan (crash rate, LCP, task completion, retention) so the redesign's impact is measurable.
Coordinated design and engineering across teams to deliver a consistent cross-device experience on schedule.
Rebuilt the PC product with a responsive architecture, lowering cross-device error rates and improving page load speed.
Unified cross-device interactions and state management for a consistent, maintainable experience.
Redesigned the information architecture and user flows to significantly lower the operation barrier.
Established consistent visual and interaction guidelines to improve web usability.

overview.goal: Led the web version of Lin En-Ru's "Simple Futures" TAIEX futures monitoring tool, integrating proprietary signals (Bull/Bear lines, strength spread, momentum, market thermometer) into a screen that reads trend at a glance.
overview.user: Futures investors who want to monitor TAIEX futures in the browser and quickly read direction and big-player flow.

items: Defined the scope of the futures web tool, integrating Bull/Bear/reversal lines, strength spread, momentum, and the market thermometer into a single-page monitoring experience.
Planned multi-timeframe candles (6m/60m/daily) and real-time bull/bear light alerts, balancing information density with readability.
Coordinated design and engineering across teams to ship a consistent mobile and desktop experience on schedule.
Built a responsive mobile-and-desktop futures monitoring page, wiring real-time quotes with smooth updates.
Implemented candle rendering and multiple technical indicators with attention to performance and maintainability.
Visualized complex futures indicators as bull/bear lights and a market thermometer to lower the reading barrier.
Established visual and interaction guidelines for a dark monitoring UI, improving comfort during long sessions.

overview.goal: Transform the weight loss journey into a game, helping users build healthy habits through challenges, social interaction, and rewards.
overview.user: Busy 30-something office workers who need peer pressure and stakes to stay consistent.

items: Demo Day: highly positive audience feedback, described as 'as addictive as playing a game'
Showcased problem-solving and adaptability: self-learning backend, handling cross-browser issues, optimizing animations
Proved ability to contribute as more than a UI implementer → capable of driving a full project to completion
Achieved 100% delivery of the gamified weight-loss platform, with testers rating it as 'exceeding bootcamp standards.'
Received unanimous acclaim at the final product demo for its quality and engaging user experience.
Successfully prevented project delays through proactive risk management and cross-functional coordination.
Demonstrated leadership in product strategy, project planning, and quality assurance.
Created a visually stunning and cohesive UI that was praised as 'addictive' and 'game-like.'
The design system streamlined the development process and ensured a consistent user experience across the platform.
Successfully integrated motion design to enhance user engagement and provide clear feedback.
The final product stands as a testament to design-driven development, where user experience was central to the platform's success.

overview.goal: To create a responsive official website that combines brand image with actual booking functionality, enhancing the hotel's digital marketing capabilities.
overview.user: Independent travelers comparing rooms and booking quickly online.

items: Successfully completed a demo of an official website with full booking functionality
Improved understanding of full-stack development: frontend UI, backend data integration, and database operations
Demonstrated independent development capabilities, able to build brand image and business logic from scratch
Designed a brand website that is both aesthetically pleasing and practical, enhancing the hotel's professional image.
The simplified booking flow design lowered the barrier to entry for users, helping to increase conversion rates.
The established design system laid an efficient foundation for future feature expansion.

overview.goal: To create a personal portfolio that showcases technical skills and design sense, packaging my diverse talents into a blind box toy concept, and leaving a deep impression on recruiters through narrative visuals during their browsing experience.
overview.user: Recruiters and collaborators who want to grasp my cross-discipline skills in minutes.

items: The portfolio successfully led to interview invitations in the overseas recruitment process
Demonstrated multilingual development, animation performance, and SEO technical skills
Proved the ability to combine technology, design, and narrative to create memorable products
Successfully created a personal website with a strong brand identity, effectively communicating my design philosophy and technical abilities.
The unique blind box concept and interactive design received positive feedback during the recruitment process and increased interview opportunities.
Demonstrated the ability to combine user experience, visual design, and frontend technology to create immersive digital products.

overview.goal: Transform Taipei Metro daily commutes into interactive urban adventures and cultural explorations. Through AI-powered companionship, immersive navigation, and collectible card systems, every ride becomes an engaging, explorable, and memorable innovative experience.
overview.user: Commuters who need clear transfers and fares, fast.

items: Created a dual user motivation combining utilitarian value (redemption for discounts) and hedonic value (collection fun).
Designed a system with business expansion potential: supporting integration with shopping districts, IP licensing cooperation, and T-Pass promotion.
Enhanced the public transportation experience, promoting cultural tourism and local connection.

overview.goal: Exploring the tactile and visual layers of the print medium, transforming the soul of text into touchable physical art.
overview.user: Readers who love physical books and notice binding and layout.

items: Utilized special paper materials and printing techniques to enhance the collectible value of books.
Strengthened the reader's immersion through visual metaphors and typographic rhythm.
Demonstrated mastery of graphic composition, color planning, and material application.

overview.goal: Creating a series of peripheral products for the Iceverse brand, integrating the brand spirit into everyday objects.
overview.user: Consumers who value product packaging and brand consistency.

items: Developed a product line with high brand recognition, strengthening the brand's extension into lifestyle scenes.
Balanced practicality with aesthetics to create a product experience with emotional value.
Implemented the full product design lifecycle from material selection to production processes.

overview.goal: Establishing a pure, modern, and inclusive brand visual system.
overview.user: Design-minded audiences who care about brand worldview and visual style.

items: Designed a complete logo system, logotypes, and a brand color palette.
Developed detailed brand guidelines to ensure consistency across different media.
Successfully established a market-competitive brand image, increasing brand value.

overview.goal: Tailor-making business cards with a personal style for actors to establish a deep professional impression in a short time.
overview.user: Performers and talents who need a crafted personal visual identity.

items: Highlighted the unique temperament of performers through atypical layout and materials.
Perfectly combined resume information with visual aesthetics to increase card retention.
Showcased a minimalist yet powerful design language within a small space.

overview.goal: Reinterpreting Taipei's urban memory, capturing the street soul of Taipei through contemporary visual language.
overview.user: Audiences who connect with city themes and local cultural visuals.

items: Combined photography and vector illustration to create layered urban visuals.
Won design awards, demonstrating sensitivity to contemporary art styles.
Sparked public attention and emotional resonance with urban spaces.

overview.goal: Build a high-conversion landing page for investment KOL, integrating company SSO, cart optimization, and YouTube live streaming to enable one-stop purchase experience.
overview.user: Viewers of investment live-streams who want a one-stop way to buy courses.

items: Integrated company SSO system to streamline user registration and purchase flow
Optimized shopping cart experience to reduce friction, boosting conversion rate by 159% (22% → 57%)
Embedded YouTube live streaming for in-page one-stop course sales
Led the cart optimization strategy, lifting conversion from 22% to 57% (+159%) by removing purchase friction.
Planned the SEO strategy that ranked core keywords #1, expanding the organic traffic funnel.
Integrated YouTube live streaming with the purchase flow to create a one-stop sales experience.
Designed high-conversion CTA layouts to guide users through purchase
Optimized cart interface to reduce drop-off points and improve checkout completion
Integrated live streaming with purchase interface for immersive sales experience

social-media-tool.title: 多平台社群發文管理工具

overview.goal: 為解決品牌經營多平台社群時需重複發文與管理的問題，打造跨平台發文工具，支援一次內容同步多個渠道，讓品牌能以更低成本擴展社群影響力並提升行銷效率。
overview.user: Social managers and marketers running many platforms who want to save posting time.

ai-data-analysis.title: AI 數據分析決策平台

overview.goal: 為解決營運人員難以從大量數據中快速獲得洞察的問題，打造 AI 數據分析平台，透過自動化分析與視覺化呈現，協助團隊快速理解趨勢並做出更精準的產品決策。
overview.user: PMs and marketers who must read product metrics and find the why every week.

ai-co-writing.title: AI 人類協作寫作平台

overview.goal: 為解決創作者在內容創作過程中靈感不足與效率低落的問題，打造 AI 與人類協作的寫作平台，透過即時 AI 建議與內容生成，幫助創作者更快產出高品質內容。
overview.user: Writers and creators who get stuck and want AI to brainstorm and tighten drafts.

overview.goal: 為幫助使用者更清晰規劃人生目標，打造結合 AI 與心理學概念的目標顯化工具，透過目標拆解與行動追蹤機制，協助使用者將抽象願景轉化為可執行的行動計畫。

about.description: Committed to finding the perfect balance between aesthetics and function across digital and physical media.
